scrapedName: Majestic Vietnam with Beach Holiday 17 days

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival
itinerary.description:
A guide will be there to greet you at Noi Bai Airport and assist you in getting to your hotel in the heart of the city. You will have the remainder of the day free to enjoy Hanoi. If you're interested, BestPrice offers you some half-day tours for brief exploration:

Hanoi Cooking Class Half Day

	

FROM US $48 /pax




Hanoi Food Tour by Motorbike at Night

	

FROM US $78 /pax




Hanoi Cyclo and Water Puppet Show With Dinner

	

FROM US $44 /pax

NOTE: If you want to get your room before the check-in time which is 14:00, you can contact our consultant, a surcharge might be applied.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Half-day City Tour - Hanoi to Sapa Bus
itinerary.description:
Morning

After a delightful meal in the morning at the hotel, tourists have free time to continue to explore Hanoi. Afternoon

By 13:30, a tour guide will lead you on a Hanoi half-day city tour, which includes most of the popular tourist destinations in Hanoi:

The first site is the Temple of Literature, which is Vietnam's earliest university. Therefore, this place is a repository for cultural imprints spanning a thousand years of civilization. Due to this, students come to pray here wishing for good luck before each key exam. You will then visit the One Pillar Pagoda, a unique Buddhist pagoda...

itinerary.title: Lao Cai - Sapa - Lao Chai - Ta Van
itinerary.description:
Morning

The trekking expedition will begin at approximately 09:30. Begin your trip to Y Linh Ho Village, located by the Muong Hoa River. You can go on to the Black Hmong Village of Lao Chai and Ta Van Village, which is home to the Zay people, to interact with them as well as learn how they live. After exploring the village, you will head back to your hotel at Sapa to take a break. Free at leisure the rest of the day, and spend an overnight at the hotel in Sapa.

itinerary.title: Sapa - Cat Cat - Sin Chai Village - Hanoi - Road transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start the day with a small breakfast at the hotel before checking out of the Sapa hotel. Today, we hike about 3 kilometers south-west of Sapa to Cat Cat Village of the Black Hmong. Then continue the trekking route to the breathtaking waterfall where you can immerse yourself in pure nature. There are also the remnants of a hydroelectric power station built by the French during the colonial era in Vietnam. During the trip, have a picnic lunch beside the river

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay - Overnight on Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Enjoy a hearty breakfast at the hotel and ready to be picked up. Then you are transferred to Halong Bay, one of the seven natural wonders of the world. After approximately 2.5 hours of transfer, you will do some check in procedures before getting on the cruise and be greeted by the crew staff on board

Typically, boarding starts at 12:00 noon. You will have a delicious lunch of seafood cooked on board while admiring the natural beauty of the harbor. Afternoon 

Take a break before taking part in a series of interesting sports on the bay

itinerary.title: Ha Long Bay - Hanoi - Flight to Da Nang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Make it a fresh morning with a Tai-chi class, or simply witness the amazing sunrise on the bay. At 07:00, you'll have a light breakfast before continuing your tour of this beautiful bay with a trip to a nearby cave and some time spent paddling a kayak. Back to the boat to complete your check-out. After that, it's time to enjoy your final great lunch on board and get ready to say goodbye to the cruise. Afternoon

Get back to the main dock for the transfer to the airport for the flight to Da Nang

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Tra Que Village - Cycling Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Following breakfast, head to the bicycle shop at 08:00 to pick up a bicycle for today's riding journey. Tra Que Village is the first stop on our route. Travelers will assist farmers in preparing and fertilizing the land with seaweed from the nearby lake. It is a chance to experience more authentic activities such as raking the ground, sowing, watering greens, picking greens, and gardening like a real farmer. Have a break after trying a lot of exciting activities, then prepare the traditional meal for lunch with your host family

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Free Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

On this free day in Hoi An, you can either spend time for yourself or sign up for our optional tour below to get more incredible moments:

My Son Sanctuary Half-Day Tour from Hoi An

	

FROM US $48 /pax




Life as A Farmer in Cam Thanh Village

	

FROM US $79 /pax




Hoi An Vespa Tour Half Day

	

FROM US $110 /pax

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Hue Road Transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

Before leaving for Hue, have a full breakfast prepared by the hotel. Take a shuttle bus from Hoi An via Cloudy Pass to Hue. Afternoon

Move to your hotel to check in and relax after a long trip. The rest of the day is free for leisure.

itinerary.title: Half-day Hue City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

In the morning, charge your energy for a Hue city tour with breakfast. Take a half-day city tour to see the grandeur of Hue, the birthplace of Vietnamese culture and home to many national treasures, including a complex of temples, pagodas, tombs, and monuments. Our first attraction in Hue is Thien Mu Pagoda, a Buddhist monument located on the banks of the lovely Perfume River and widely regarded as a must-see in Hue. The second stop is the Imperial Citadel, Hue's must-go destination. This place witnesses a glorious era in Vietnam’s history

itinerary.title: Hue - Flight To Ho Chi Minh
itinerary.description: Our final breakfast in Hue will be served at the hotel before we transfer to Phu Bai Airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Enjoy the last moments soaking in the tranquil atmosphere of Hue as you prepare for the next leg of your journey. Upon arrival at Tan Son Nhat International Airport in Ho Chi Minh City, you will be warmly welcomed and transferred directly to your hotel. Take some time to relax and settle in, as exciting adventures await you in this vibrant metropolis.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh - Insight Mekong Delta Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

07:00 - 07:30: Begin your day with a hotel pickup in Saigon, heading to Ben Tre Province. Enjoy scenic views of lush forests and local daily life along the way. Board a peaceful cruise along the Ham Luong River, one of the nine tributaries of the Mekong Delta. Admire the tranquil beauty of the waterway as you sail past riverside villages. Stop at a traditional coconut workshop to witness local artisans crafting handmade products and experience their warm hospitality
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Phan Thiet - Road transfer
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast at the hotel and start packing your luggage. 08:30: The tour guide and driver will come and transfer to the bus office to catch the shuttle bus to Mui Ne. After about 5 hours, you will arrive in Mui Ne and transfer to the hotel. Check in your hotel, then enjoy your free time on the beach for the rest of the day or take a break in your own room. NOTE: Private car transfer will be applied for private tours.

itinerary.title: Free Day to Relax in Phan Thiet
itinerary.description: Enjoy a full free day to relax and unwind in the coastal town of Phan Thiet. Bask in the warm sunshine on Mui Ne's golden beaches, take a dip in the clear blue sea, or explore the charming fishing villages nearby. If you're feeling adventurous, try kitesurfing, visit the iconic Red and White Sand Dunes, or take a walk to the scenic Fairy Stream. The day is yours to enjoy at your own pace.

itinerary.title: Phan Thiet - Ho Chi Minh City - Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

The morning is free for you to leisurely enjoy the final breakfast in Phan Thiet. Then you'll have free time till check out. BestPrice's driver will transfer you back to Ho Chi Minh and drop you off directly at the airport to catch a flight back home. Pick-up time at the hotel in Mui Ne: 13:30 - 14:00. Arrival time at the airport in Ho Chi Minh City: 19:00

highlights: Visit Hanoi’s famous tourist attractions and learn about the past of the city
Admire the stunning mountainous scenery in Sapa and get to know the ethnic culture
Enjoy the seascape while taking part in thrilling activities in Halong Bay
Explore the charm of the old capital Hue through historical places, and visit the lovely ancient town of Hoi An
Experience the local life of the rivulet area of Mekong Delta
Unwind your mind on tropical scene with sandy beaches and blue ocean in Phan Thiet
included: Accommodation in DBL/ TWN sharing room at hotel, except overnight on train and home stay (if any)
All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up and see off)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
2 domestic flights Hanoi – Hue and Da Nang – Ho Chi Minh City
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
